apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of private, public and global enterprises to real-life business scenarios.
Students will be able to apply the characteristics of private, public and global enterprises to identify suitable business models.
Students will be able to apply the advantages and disadvantages of private, public and global enterprises to make informed business decisions.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the strengths and weaknesses of private, public and global enterprises in terms of their operations and management.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of private, public and global enterprises on the environment and society.
Students will be able to analyze the factors that influence the success of private, public and global enterprises and suggest improvements.
remember: Students will be able to recall the definitions and characteristics of private, public and global enterprises.
Students will be able to recall the differences between private, public and global enterprises.
Students will be able to recall the advantages and disadvantages of private, public and global enterprises.
understand: Students will be able to understand the role of private, public and global enterprises in the economy.
Students will be able to understand the impact of private, public and global enterprises on the society.
Students will be able to understand the factors that influence the success of private, public and global enterprises.

ncert_objectives: Explain the characteristics of private, public and global enterprises.
Distinguish between private, public and global enterprises on the basis of ownership, control and objectives.
Explain the advantages and disadvantages of private, public and global enterprises.
board_exam_objectives: To identify and explain the characteristics of private, public and global enterprises.
To differentiate between private, public and global enterprises on the basis of ownership and control.
To explain the role of private, public and global enterprises in the economy.
